outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: negative GEX across all expiries amplifies price movements. Dealers short gamma will accelerate selling into weakness.
outlook.summary: Market structure shows strong bearish bias with dominant put walls and negative total GEX (-2.64B combined). The 600 RESONANCE level acts as magnetic ceiling while 575-580 zone provides critical support. Monthly smirk skew (1.35) confirms hedging pressure. Expect mean reversion toward 590 Max Pain zone.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed due to high positive GEX, but risk of volatility spike if 6600 support breaks.
outlook.summary: Market is in a bearish pinning scenario between the 0DTE Max Pain (6620) and the massive Monthly Put Wall (6600). High positive GEX (5.25B) suppresses volatility, favoring mean reversion. However, the extreme Put/Call Ratio (3.46 Monthly) and steep Skew (1.49) indicate strong hedging pressure. Expect price to magnetize towards 6620 while 6600 acts as a structural floor.
